title: Lösing Filtertechnik
description: Lösing Filtertechnik (Willibrord Lösing Filtertechnik e.K.) is a leading German specialist in filtration technology with more than 70 years of experience since its founding in 1955.The company offers a wide range of high-quality filters, including oil, air, fuel, hydraulic, and water filtration solutions, along with custom-tailored products for various industries such as automotive, commercial vehicles, construction machinery, rail transport, and more.Known for its expertise with brands like SEPAR and a strong focus on innovation, Lösing develops individual solutions precisely matched to customer requirements while maintaining top quality and reliable service.Headquartered in Hattingen, Germany, the company serves both B2B clients and private customers through its online shop, emphasizing perfect filtration for every challenge. https://***.de/
